blocks.text: Record-breaking cricket news: Scotland's T20 World Cup ends with Sri Lanka defeat. Scotland's T20 World Cup campaign ends in a thrilling final-over defeat by Sri Lanka at Old Trafford. Sarah Bryce's unbeaten 47 runs helps Scotland to 151-6, but Sri Lanka win by three wickets.
Scotland's T20 World Cup campaign ends in a thrilling final-over defeat by Sri Lanka at Old Trafford.
Sarah Bryce's unbeaten 47 runs helps Scotland to 151-6, but Sri Lanka win by three wickets.
